# Nano Banana Prompt Guide — Banana Clean

> Curated PDF collection of 50+ battle-tested prompts for AI image generation with Nano Banana and Gemini. 12 style categories, composition tips, parameter cheat sheets. Free bonus tool included. From $2.99/month.

---

## What Is the Nano Banana Prompt Guide

The Nano Banana Prompt Guide is a curated PDF collection of 50+ battle-tested prompts for generating high-quality images with Nano Banana and Nano Banana Pro (Google's image generation models available in Gemini and AI Studio).

Each prompt has been tested across multiple seeds for consistency — not scraped, not autogenerated. For every prompt, you get the exact wording, recommended parameters, and a reference output so you know what to expect before you type.

The guide is organized into 12 style categories:
- Photorealistic Portraits
- 3D & Isometric Renders
- Anime & Manga
- Digital Illustration
- Product Photography
- Architectural Visualization
- Landscape & Nature
- Abstract & Experimental
- Food Photography
- Fashion & Editorial
- Text & Typography Art
- Character Design

Each category contains 4-6 tested prompts with detailed notes on parameter settings, seed behavior, and style strength.

## What's Included

### 50+ Curated Prompts
Every prompt is hand-tested across multiple seeds. You get the exact wording, not a vague description. Copy, paste, generate.

### 12 Style Categories
From photorealistic portraits to 3D renders to anime illustrations — organized so you can find the right prompt for your project in seconds.

### Composition & Lighting Reference
Quick reference sheets for camera angles, lighting setups, aspect ratios, and color grading. Stop guessing which terms produce which effects.

### Parameter Cheat Sheets
Optimal settings for resolution, style strength, seed behavior, and negative prompting. No more trial and error with sliders.

### Regular Updates
As Nano Banana models improve, the guide is updated with new prompts and tested against the latest versions. Subscribers get all updates at no extra cost.

## Free Bonus Tool

Every subscription includes a free bonus browser tool that enhances your AI image workflow. It works alongside the prompt guide to save you time on repetitive tasks. You'll receive access details together with the PDF after payment.

## Pricing

- **Monthly — $2.99/mo:** Full access to the prompt guide, all 12 categories, regular updates, and the free bonus tool. Cancel anytime.
- **Yearly — $24.99/yr:** Same features, 30% cheaper ($2.08/mo effective). Billed annually. Cancel anytime.

Payment methods: credit cards, debit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Telegram Stars.

## How to Get the Guide

1. Choose Monthly or Yearly on the pricing page
2. Pay with card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or Telegram Stars
3. Download the PDF instantly — the link appears on screen after payment
4. You also receive the PDF and activation key by email

## Privacy & Security

- Payment processing is handled by Square — Banana Clean never stores your card details
- The PDF guide is delivered as a direct download
- The bonus tool processes data locally in your browser — nothing is uploaded to a server
- Anonymous product analytics help us improve the guide and tool

## Manual Gemini watermark remover

The manual watermark remover is a browser-based fallback for difficult Gemini and Nano Banana image watermarks. Upload an image, paint the remaining visible mark with a circular brush, run local MI-GAN inpainting, and download the cleaned result.

Use it when automatic cleanup leaves a trace on wood, marble, glass, water, fabric, product photos, or other detailed textures. Cleanup runs in the browser. Optional sample upload is separate and requires explicit consent.
